# PERF-210 positive: go-redis KEYS used in a request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-210-vulnerable.go
variant: framework
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/redis/go-redis/v9"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, rdb *redis.Client) error {
	keys, err := rdb.Keys(r.Context(), "user:*").Result()
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte(join(keys)))
	return nil
}

func join(s []string) string {
	out := ""
	for _, v := range s {
		out += v
	}
	return out
}
